case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. S-954 of 2023

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S-954 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No. 41/2024 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No. 42/2024 (Exh/A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.01.2024 Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate for applicant *************** 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Deferred 3. Granted subject to just all exceptions. 4. The instant application has been filed against the order dated 15.09.2023, wherein learned trial Court had granted pre-arrest bail to respondent/accused on the ground of delay of about 17 days in lodgment of the FIR, which has not been explained properly and in the night hours identification is shown for which no source has been pointed out and that no direct role has been assigned to the respondent/accused and the offence with which respondent/accused is charged does not fall within the ambit of prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.PC. No illegality or any infirmity has been pointed by the learned counsel for applicant in the impugned order which is based on sound reasons calling for no interference by this Court. Result thereof, this application is dismissed in limine. J U D G E M. Ali/steno
